mapper.select: SELECT p.plan_id, 0 AS result_id, p.planned_date, NULL AS executed_date, NULL AS executed_by, NULL AS summary_judge, NULL AS summary_note, NULL AS next_recommended_date, NULL AS approval_status, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_code, t.inspection_kind, p.planned_date AS planned_time, p.person_code, t.template_name, p.template_id FROM inspection_plans p LEFT JOIN equipment e ON p.equipment_code = e.equipment_code LEFT JOIN inspection_template t ON p.template_id = t.template_id WHERE p.plan_id = #{planId}

SELECT p.plan_id, COALESCE(r.result_id, 0) AS result_id, p.planned_date, r.executed_date, r.executed_by, r.summary_judge, r.summary_note, r.next_recommended_date, r.approval_status, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_code, t.inspection_kind, p.planned_date AS planned_time, p.person_code, t.template_name, p.template_id FROM inspection_plans p LEFT JOIN inspection_results r ON p.plan_id = r.plan_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON p.equipment_code = e.equipment_code LEFT JOIN inspection_template t ON p.template_id = t.template_id
p.planned_date = #{targetDate}
AND p.person_code = #{personCode}
AND (r.result_id IS NULL OR r.approval_status IS NULL OR r.approval_status = '')
AND r.result_id IS NOT NULL AND (r.approval_status = '一部完了' OR r.approval_status IS NULL)
AND r.approval_status = '完了'
ORDER BY p.planned_date ASC, e.equipment_name ASC

SELECT r.*, p.planned_date, p.person_code, p.template_id, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_code, t.inspection_kind, t.template_name FROM inspection_results r JOIN inspection_plans p ON r.plan_id = p.plan_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON p.equipment_code = e.equipment_code LEFT JOIN inspection_template t ON p.template_id = t.template_id WHERE r.result_id = #{resultId}

SELECT ir.*, i.item_name, i.item_level, i.parent_item_id, i.sort_order FROM inspection_items_results ir JOIN inspection_items i ON ir.item_id = i.item_id WHERE ir.result_id = #{resultId} ORDER BY i.item_level ASC, i.sort_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_results SET approval_status = #{param2}, reject_reason = #{param3}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE result_id = #{param1}

UPDATE inspection_results SET approval_status = '承認済', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE result_id IN
#{id}

UPDATE inspection_results SET approval_status = '差戻', reject_reason = #{reason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE result_id IN
#{id}

UPDATE inspection_results SET executed_date = #{executedDate}, executed_by = #{executedBy}, summary_judge = #{summaryJudge}, summary_note = #{summaryNote}, next_recommended_date = #{nextRecommendedDate}, approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE result_id = #{resultId}
